channel.title: Go on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Go on Arrans github.io

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with OpenAI gpt-oss, DeepSeek-R1, Gemma 3 and other models.

item.title: hacdias/webdav
item.description: A simple and standalone WebDAV server.

item.title: ayn2op/discordo
item.description: A lightweight, secure, and feature-rich Discord terminal (TUI) client.

item.title: rclone/rclone
item.description: “rsync for cloud storage” - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted note-taking service. Your thoughts, your data, your control — no tracking, no ads, no subscription fees.

item.title: getarcaneapp/arcane
item.description: Modern Docker Management, Designed for Everyone

item.title: gin-gonic/gin
item.description: Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

item.title: wailsapp/wails
item.description: Create beautiful applications using Go

item.title: gitleaks/gitleaks
item.description: Find secrets with Gitleaks 🔑

item.title: php/frankenphp
item.description: 🧟 The modern PHP app server

item.title: bluenviron/mediamtx
item.description: Ready-to-use SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback video and audio streams.

item.title: donetick/donetick
item.description: Donetick an open-source, user-friendly app for managing tasks and chores, featuring customizable options to help you and others stay organized

item.title: TwiN/gatus
item.description: ⛑ Automated developer-oriented status page

item.title: arp242/goatcounter
item.description: Easy web analytics. No tracking of personal data.

item.title: zincsearch/zincsearch
item.description: ZincSearch . A lightweight alternative to elasticsearch that requires minimal resources, written in Go.

item.title: charmbracelet/bubbletea
item.description: A powerful little TUI framework 🏗

item.title: glanceapp/glance
item.description: A self-hosted dashboard that puts all your feeds in one place

item.title: juicedata/juicefs
item.description: JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

item.title: vicanso/go-charts
item.description: A charts library for Golang

item.title: drakkan/sftpgo
item.description: Full-featured and highly configurable SFTP, HTTP/S, FTP/S and WebDAV server - S3, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob

item.title: riverqueue/river
item.description: Fast and reliable background jobs in Go

item.title: Adembc/lazyssh
item.description: A terminal-based SSH manager inspired by lazydocker and k9s - Written in go

item.title: Infisical/infisical
item.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets, certificates, and privileged access management.

item.title: alecthomas/chroma
item.description: A general purpose syntax highlighter in pure Go

item.title: go-task/task
item.description: A task runner / simpler Make alternative written in Go

item.title: gorse-io/gorse
item.description: Gorse open source recommender system engine

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: tmc/langchaingo
item.description: LangChain for Go, the easiest way to write LLM-based programs in Go

item.title: inbucket/inbucket
item.description: Disposable webmail server (similar to Mailinator) with built in SMTP, POP3, RESTful servers; no DB required.

item.title: Shopify/toxiproxy
item.description: ⏰ 🔥 A TCP proxy to simulate network and system conditions for chaos and resiliency testing

item.title: coder/websocket
item.description: Minimal and idiomatic WebSocket library for Go

item.title: kubernetes/minikube
item.description: Run Kubernetes locally

item.title: spf13/cobra
item.description: A Commander for modern Go CLI interactions

item.title: writefreely/writefreely
item.description: A clean, Markdown-based publishing platform made for writers. Write together and build a community.

item.title: knadh/koanf
item.description: Simple, extremely lightweight, extensible, configuration management library for Go. Supports JSON, TOML, YAML, env, command line, file, S3 etc. Alternative to viper.

item.title: sashabaranov/go-openai
item.description: OpenAI ChatGPT, GPT-5, GPT-Image-1, Whisper API clients for Go

item.title: go-shiori/shiori
item.description: Simple bookmark manager built with Go

item.title: quic-go/quic-go
item.description: A production-ready QUIC implementation in pure Go

item.title: tinode/chat
item.description: Instant messaging platform. Backend in Go. Clients: Swift iOS, Java Android, JS webapp, scriptable command line; chatbots

item.title: golang-migrate/migrate
item.description: Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.

item.title: golangci/golangci-lint
item.description: Fast linters runner for Go

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: terrastruct/d2
item.description: D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

item.title: mislav/hub
item.description: A command-line tool that makes git easier to use with GitHub.

item.title: tmrts/go-patterns
item.description: Curated list of Go design patterns, recipes and idioms

item.title: beego/beego
item.description: beego is an open-source, high-performance web framework for the Go programming language.

item.title: pingcap/tidb
item.description: TiDB - the open-source, cloud-native, distributed SQL database designed for modern applications.

item.title: psanford/wormhole-william
item.description: End-to-end encrypted file transfer. A magic wormhole CLI and API in Go (golang).

item.title: axllent/mailpit
item.description: An email and SMTP testing tool with API for developers

item.title: mattn/go-sqlite3
item.description: sqlite3 driver for go using database/sql

item.title: containrrr/shoutrrr
item.description: Notification library for gophers and their furry friends.

item.title: caarlos0/env
item.description: A simple, zero-dependencies library to parse environment variables into structs

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: shopspring/decimal
item.description: Arbitrary-precision fixed-point decimal numbers in Go

item.title: wader/fq
item.description: jq for binary formats - tool, language and decoders for working with binary and text formats

item.title: dweymouth/supersonic
item.description: A lightweight and full-featured cross-platform desktop client for self-hosted music servers

item.title: alecthomas/participle
item.description: A parser library for Go

item.title: Masterminds/sprig
item.description: Useful template functions for Go templates.

item.title: golang/oauth2
item.description: Go OAuth2

item.title: deepnoodle-ai/risor
item.description: Fast and flexible scripting for Go developers and DevOps.

item.title: sedyh/awesome-ebitengine
item.description: A curated list of awesome Ebitengine frameworks, libraries and software

item.title: ThreeDotsLabs/watermill
item.description: Building event-driven applications the easy way in Go.

item.title: zitadel/oidc
item.description: Easy to use OpenID Connect client and server library written for Go and certified by the OpenID Foundation

item.title: redis/rueidis
item.description: A fast Golang Redis client that supports Client Side Caching, Auto Pipelining, Generics OM, RedisJSON, RedisBloom, RediSearch, etc.

item.title: expr-lang/expr
item.description: Expression language and expression evaluation for Go

item.title: bitfield/script
item.description: Making it easy to write shell-like scripts in Go

item.title: mappu/miqt
item.description: MIT-licensed Qt bindings for Go

item.title: janpfeifer/gonb
item.description: GoNB, a Go Notebook Kernel for Jupyter

item.title: context-labs/mactop
item.description: mactop - Apple Silicon Monitor Top

item.title: k0kubun/pp
item.description: Colored pretty printer for Go language

item.title: TomWright/dasel
item.description: Select, put and delete data from JSON, TOML, YAML, XML and CSV files with a single tool. Supports conversion between formats and can be used as a Go package.

item.title: Jacalz/rymdport
item.description: Cross-platform application for easy encrypted file, folder, and text sharing between devices.

item.title: ergo-services/ergo
item.description: An actor-based Framework with network transparency for creating event-driven architecture in Golang. Inspired by Erlang. Zero dependencies.

item.title: ebitengine/oto
item.description: ♪ A low-level library to play sound on multiple platforms ♪

item.title: cloudquery/cloudquery
item.description: Data pipelines for cloud config and security data. Build cloud asset inventory, CSPM, FinOps, and vulnerability management solutions. Extract from AWS, Azure, GCP, and 70+ cloud and SaaS sources.

item.title: go-flutter-desktop/go-flutter
item.description: Flutter on Windows, MacOS and Linux - based on Flutter Embedding, Go and GLFW.

item.title: mmcdole/gofeed
item.description: Parse RSS, Atom and JSON feeds in Go

item.title: ebitengine/purego
item.description: A library for calling C functions from Go without Cgo

item.title: zyedidia/eget
item.description: Easily install prebuilt binaries from GitHub.

item.title: Tanq16/backhub
item.description: Backhub helps maintain backups of multiple GitHub repos as full local mirrors.

item.title: Tanq16/danzo
item.description: Swiss army knife of multi-service CLI download utilities written on Go.

item.title: yuin/goldmark
item.description: 🏆 A markdown parser written in Go. Easy to extend, standard(CommonMark) compliant, well structured.

item.title: GianlucaP106/mynav
item.description: Workspace and session management TUI

item.title: keybase/client
item.description: Keybase Go Library, Client, Service, OS X, iOS, Android, Electron

item.title: golang-design/clipboard
item.description: 📋 cross-platform clipboard package that supports accessing text and image in Go (macOS/Linux/Windows/Android/iOS)

item.title: google/go-cmp
item.description: Package for comparing Go values in tests

item.title: FyshOS/fynedesk
item.description: A full desktop environment for Linux/Unix using Fyne

item.title: wneessen/go-mail
item.description: 📧 Easy to use, yet comprehensive library for sending mails with Go

item.title: arl/statsviz
item.description: Visualise Go runtime metrics in real time

item.title: EchoVault/SugarDB
item.description: Embeddable and distributed in-memory alternative to Redis.

item.title: adrg/xdg
item.description: Go implementation of the XDG Base Directory Specification and XDG user directories

item.title: vjerci/gochromecast
item.description: A simple tool to stream your media to android TV or chromecast device

item.title: mautrix/go
item.description: A Golang Matrix framework.

item.title: yassinebenaid/bunster
item.description: Compile shell scripts to static binaries.

item.title: BobdaProgrammer/doWM
item.description: A beautiful window manager for x11

item.title: goplus/spx
item.description: spx - A Scratch Compatible Go/XGo 2D Game Engine for STEM education

item.title: gocopper/copper
item.description: 🚀‏‏‎ ‎‏‏‎‏‏‎‎‎‎‎‎Copper is a Go toolkit complete with everything you need to build web apps.

item.title: JohannesKaufmann/html-to-markdown
item.description: ⚙️ Convert HTML to Markdown. Even works with entire websites and can be extended through rules.

item.title: jinzhu/now
item.description: Now is a time toolkit for golang

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.
